message:
Clarify lossy dtype fallback behavior in UFuncArray docs

Expand doc comments on from_values_with_dtype_lossy and full_like to
make explicit that the F64 fallback is intentional when the requested
dtype (e.g. complex or temporal) cannot be represented through the
Vec<f64> bridge. This prevents confusion about silent dtype changes
and aligns the docs with the actual error-recovery semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
